data.content: Implementation already complete from prior session (commit b62626d3). Quality gates now pass on committed code: typecheck, lint, 134 test files (1994 tests), and build all green. The unstaged modifications in the working tree are unrelated to this knot. The rollbackBeatState function in memory-manager-commands.ts correctly uses 'kno rollback <id>' instead of 'kno update <id> --status <state>'.
